title: ainsliaea bonatii var. bonatii
intro: Ainsliaea bonatii var. bonatii, also known as the Asian ainsliaea, is a type of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat a range of health issues. The health benefits of Ainsliaea bonatii var. bonatii include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and aiding in the recovery from infections. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as decoctions and infusions, are commonly used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
